  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately",
    "Loosen all fasteners in the affected joint",
    "Inspect fasteners, gaskets, and mating surfaces for damage or deformation",
    "Re-torque the joint following the engineered star/spiral sequence pattern from the center outward"

  "rationale": "The technician violated the engineered torque sequence pattern during assembly. This can cause uneven gasket compression, joint misalignment, and potential leaks or structural failure. Work must be stopped, fasteners loosened, components inspected, and the torque sequence executed correctly according to OEM/engineering specifications before work can proceed.",

  ]
